facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 61 reviews. PHỞ THỐ ĐÁ 1990 keeps showing up on locals' lists and most tourists walk right past it.

This bistro on Lý Thường Kiệt is the kind of place that earns a near-perfect score by doing one thing right, consistently. Bowl after bowl.

If you're eating pho in Phu Quoc, this is the address. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Steam rising. Broth poured. 4.9 stars earned one bowl at a time. PHỞ THỐ ĐÁ 1990 on Lý Thường Kiệt is short on hype and long on flavor. Tag your travel buddy.
